Headline: #6 Jackson Park Express, #2 Hyde Park Express and #28 Stony Island Temporary Northbound Reroute near Stony Island/57th
ShortDescription: Northbound #6 Jackson Park Express, #2 Hyde Park Express, #28 Stony Island rerouted in due to street blockage near Stony Island/57th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #6 Jackson Park Express, #2 Hyde Park Express and #28 Stony Island rerouted in due to street blockage near Stony Island/57th. 

  • Northbound #6 Jackson Park Express & Northbound #28 Stony Island, buses will operate via Stony Island, 59th, Cornell, 57th and Hyde Park Blvd then resume their normal route.
  • Northbound #2 Hyde Park Express buses will operate via Stony Island, 59th St., Cornell and 57th St, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #171 U. of Chicago/Hyde Park Temporary Northbound Reroute near University/58th
ShortDescription: Northbound #171 U. of Chicago/Hyde Park buses are rrtd via 59th, Woodlawn and 55th, & over normal route on due to parade/carnival/festival near University/58th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Northbound #171 U. of Chicago/Hyde Park buses are temporarily rerouted via 59th, Woodlawn and 55th, then resume their normal route.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to parade/carnival/festival near University/58th.

Headline: 111th/Throop Temporary Reroute near 111th/Throop
ShortDescription: 111 King Dr/111th rr EB via 119th, Ashland, 115th & Halsted; WB via 111th, Halsted, 115th, Marshfield, then into terminal due to construction nr 111th/Throop.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#111 King Drive/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions. Buses will operate as follows:

Eastbound buses will operate via 119th, Ashland, 115th, Halsted, then resume their normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via 111th, Halsted, 115th, Marshfield, then into the terminal.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 111th/Throop.
